case_title: MEX EXPRESS, INC. VS. YANDY PADILLA PACHELO GUSTAVO

docket_entries.description: FILED SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEX EXPRESS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GUSTAVO, YANDY PADILLA PACHELO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,286.73 FILED BY MEX EXPRESS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GUSTAVO, YANDY PADILLA PACHELO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (NO FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED APR-30-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GUSTAVO, YANDY PADILLA PACHELO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-25-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MEX EXPRESS, INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: JOSE O. MARTINEZ. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO 9/25/18 AT 3:30PM. POS FILED ON 6/11/18 IS DEFECTIVE.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE FILED BY MEX EXPRESS, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
